name: Lupine Reeded Two Door Storage Cabinet with Adjustable Shelf and Cable Management Dark Brown - Threshold™
description:
Organize your space with the charming style of this Lupine Reeded Two-Door Storage Cabinet from Threshold™. This wooden storage cabinet features a clean-lined silhouette and has a narrow reeded pattern in dark brown to complement variety of design aesthetics and color palettes. Adjustable shelves offer plenty of room for your books and everyday essentials, while the tabletop offers enough space for framed photos, vases and other decorative items.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Overall Width: 34-1/4 inches
Overall Height: 30-1/4 inches
Overall Depth: 15-3/4 inches
Distance from floor to bottom panel: 4-1/4 inches
Thickness of top panel: 1-1/4 inches
Height of door: 24-3/4 inches
Width of door: 15-3/4 inches
